title: Chapter 59
content:
Chapter 59: Chapter 59: Peak True Spirit Realm

Damon now sitting on the edge of the bed, scanning through the endless notifications.

[Mia Nightrider’s Interest reaches 1000/1000, new relationship level unlocked, +4000 lust points!]

[Mia Nightrider’s Relationship change from In Love to Deeply in Love, +10000 lust points!]

[Now, point gains from Mia Nightrider will be multiplied by 5]

[Mio Nightrider ’s Interest reaches 1000/1000, new relationship level unlocked, +4000 lust points!]

[Mio Nightrider’s Relationship change from In Love to Deeply in Love, +10000 lust points!]

[Now point gains from Mio Nightrider will be multiplied by 5]

[You had foursome with 3-woman, +10000 lust points]

[...]

...

...

[You made a divine being climax, +100000 lust points]

Seeing the last notification Damon was shocked from the point he gains from Neko.

’Maybe I should make Neko cum more often, and maybe going further—, But the system cut him off.’

[Host, the system suggest you refrain from going further with Neko.]

’Huh, why?’

[It’s due to her cultivation host, her realm to powerful, if you had sex of even absorb her yin qi, you body won’t be able to handle that. Your body only able to handle her if your cultivation at Origin Realm or you Incubus lord at Sovereign Grade.]

’Haah... alright I got it.’

Then Damon opens his status.

[Name: Damon]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Earth: 60, Lightning: 310, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 654,500]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

Damon smile with the current point he got.

’More than half a million... What should I use it for... For now, Upgrade my spiritual roots to heaven grade.’

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Earth Grade - Peak → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - Low. -100000 lust points.]

’Ouch, 100k for one upgrade, but with this the cost for advancing my cultivation should be lessening. System advances my cultivation to Ninth Level of True Spirit Realm.’

[Cultivation increased! Second Level of the True Spirit Realm → Third Level of the True Spirit Realm. -200 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Third Level of the True Spirit Realm → Fourth Level of the True Spirit Realm. -400 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Fourth Level of the True Spirit Realm → Fifth Level of the True Spirit Realm. -800 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Fifth Level of the True Spirit Realm → Sixth Level of the True Spirit Realm. -1600 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Sixth Level of the True Spirit Realm → Seventh Level of the True Spirit Realm. -3200 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Seventh Level of the True Spirit Realm → Eighth Level of the True Spirit Realm. -6400 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Eighth Level of the True Spirit Realm → Ninth Level of the True Spirit Realm. -12800 lust points.]

Seeing the cost Damon smile, if he didn’t upgrade his spiritual roots first, it will cost him over two hundred fifty points. Then he looks at his point.

[Lust points: 529,100]

’Hmm... Let’s buy 3 storage ring and upgrade my wooden sword to heaven grade.’

[You bought three Heaven Grade Storage Ring. -75,000 lust points.]

[Special Training Sword upgraded! Special Training Sword, Normal Grade Weapon → Heavenly Wooden Sword, Heaven Grade Weapon. -25,000 lust points.]

[Heavenly Wooden Sword]

[Description: A Wooden Sword made from 10,000 years Heavenly wood that can absorb qi and spiritual energy instantly. Cannot be damage unless using sword intent.]

[Heaven Grade Weapon - Peak]

He then summons the sword. What used to look like a regular brown wooden training sword now change into ad dark brown almost like a black sword. it didn’t even look like it made from wood.

Damon lips crept into a smile. Then he put back his sword.

He looks toward Mio and Mia look for their status.

[Name: Mio Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 150/5000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Bow: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Void Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Void Sniper] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Void Sniper] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Cheerful, Natural Archer, Loyal, Airhead, Doting Big-Sister]

[Name: Mia Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: Deeply in Love]

[Interest: 240/5000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Dagger: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Shadow Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Shadow Queen] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Shadow Queen] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Shy, Natural Assassin, Loyal, Intelligent, Close Pervert, Masochist]

He nodded with a smile, then he adjusts his cultivation to First Level of True Spirit Realm using polymorph and open his status once more.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - First Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 65, Water: 65, Ice: 65, Wind: 65, Earth: 65, Lightning: 315, Nature: 65, Light: 65, Dark: 65, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 429,100]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

Now he done with his upgrade, he then lay on the bed with the girls and closed his eyes.
